framework.name: RWA HQLA Eligibility Framework
framework.scope: Tokenised Real-World Assets — HQLA eligibility under Basel III LCR
framework.methodology: Block A tests alternative eligibility routes and closes a route when a mandatory criterion fails. Block C tests market-liquidity requirements. Block B contains operational requirements that must be satisfied in use but may be remediable; Block D is a qualitative wrapper-friction overlay. Final classification remains subject to supervisory judgement.

BUIDL.full_name: BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund Ltd
BUIDL.exemption_regime: Securities Act Rule 506(c) + Investment Company Act §3(c)(7)
BUIDL.tokenisation_provider: Securitize Markets LLC + Securitize LLC (transfer agent)

OUSG.full_name: Ondo Short-Term US Government Treasuries (Ondo I LP)
OUSG.exemption_regime: Securities Act Rule 506(c) + Investment Company Act §3(c)(7)
OUSG.underlying_composition: Fund-of-funds (BUIDL primary holding + Franklin Templeton + WisdomTree + Fidelity + bank deposits + USDC liquidity buffer)

bIB01.exemption_regime: EU Prospectus Regulation 2017/1129 (tripartite SPWS) + Swiss DLT art. 973d CO
bIB01.underlying: iShares $ Treasury Bond 0-1yr UCITS ETF (USD Acc)

block_A_eligibility_category.description: Eligibility category cascade per DR 2015/61 art. 10-15

BUIDL.justification: Token = interest in BVI fund Ltd, not direct claim on US Treasury. Investment Company Act §3(c)(7) confirms private fund status.

OUSG.justification: Token = interest in Delaware LP holding fund interests (incl. BUIDL) — two-layer wrapping.

bIB01.justification: Token = debt instrument issued by Backed Assets (JE) Limited, tracking ETF price. No direct sovereign exposure.

criteria.name: UCITS look-through (Level 1/2A via art. 15)
criteria.reference: DR 2015/61 art. 15; ESMA UCITS Eligible Assets Directive 2007/16/EC

BUIDL.justification: BVI exempted fund is not a UCITS. No EU recognition or passport.

OUSG.justification: Delaware LP is not a UCITS. Holds non-UCITS funds primarily.

bIB01.justification: bIB01 itself is a debt instrument, not a part of a UCITS. Holding bIB01 = holding contractual debt of Backed Assets referenced to UCITS price. Underlying iShares IB01 is a UCITS but investor does not own it.

BUIDL.justification: Equity-like fund interest, not corporate debt.

bIB01.justification: Backed Assets (JE) Limited is unrated. Under CRR art. 122 (Standardised Approach for corporates unrated) → 100% risk weight. Disqualifies Level 2A (requires 20% RW).

BUIDL.justification: Not equity.

bIB01.justification: Not equity.

aggregate_verdict.BUIDL: Not eligible for any HQLA level
aggregate_verdict.OUSG: Not eligible for any HQLA level
aggregate_verdict.bIB01: Not eligible for any HQLA level

BUIDL.justification: Whitelist KYC enforced on-chain; freeze function; transferable only between Securitize-onboarded accounts.

OUSG.justification: Transferable only between investors onboarded to Ondo Qualified Access Funds.

bIB01.justification: Pause function active; sanctions blocking via Chainalysis; freezing function reserved for upgrade; Issuer Call Option unilateral with 30 BD notice.

BUIDL.justification: Self-custody possible via Anchorage, Fireblocks, Coinbase Custody, BitGo (whitelisted).

bIB01.justification: Custody via Maerki Baumann or InCore Bank; self-custody whitelisted possible.

BUIDL.justification: USDC instant via Circle + USD T+1.

OUSG.justification: USDC instant + USD T+1; daily NAV; JPMorgan/Mastercard/Ripple cross-border pilot validated 6 May 2026.

bIB01.justification: Settlement T+5 maximum. Underlying Illiquidity clause may further delay.

BUIDL.justification: Mechanics in PPM (private). Public press releases confirm USDC + USD routes.

OUSG.justification: Detailed in Ondo Instant Limits documentation.

bIB01.justification: Issuance and Redemption fully documented in Base Prospectus §VI.

BUIDL.justification: Institutional-level criterion, not product-level.

bIB01.justification: Same.

criteria.name: Listed on developed and recognised exchange

BUIDL.justification: Not registered with SEC and not listed on any exchange (BlackRock disclosure verbatim).

OUSG.justification: Not listed; secondary trading via Uniswap/CowSwap permissionless AMM only.

bIB01.justification: Final Terms: Initial offer without admission to trading. Issuer intends to admit at INX Securities ATS but no market making, no liquidity guarantee.

criteria.name: Active and sizable market with low concentration

BUIDL.justification: 76 holders on Ethereum mainnet (approximately 51 effective after dust filtering); Top-3 = 55.22%, constrained-reconstruction Gini = 0.863, exact feasible bounds [0.850, 0.885]. 14,046 total transfers / 3,151 secondary over 26 months = approximately 4 secondary transfers/day. Dune snapshot 2026-06-17.

OUSG.justification: 2,119 total / 851 secondary transfers over 41 months = ~0.7 secondary tx/day. Dune snapshot 2026-06-17.

bIB01.justification: Empirical paradox: 510 total / 492 secondary = 96% secondary share (highest of the three, structural distinction as debt instrument vs whitelisted fund share). However, only 0.43 secondary tx/day in absolute terms. Ratio nuances binary Fail; absolute volume still insufficient for HQLA. Dune snapshot 2026-06-17.

BUIDL.justification: No committed market makers.

bIB01.justification: Market Maker: Not applicable (verbatim in Final Terms §1.1).

BUIDL.justification: Insufficient secondary market depth.

bIB01.justification: Same.

criteria.name: Proven liquidity in stress (max drawdown 10% over 30-day stress)

BUIDL.justification: Insufficient track record (since March 2024); no qualifying stress event observed.

bIB01.justification: Same logic.

block_D_wrapper_friction.description: Wrapper-specific frictions not directly addressed by DR 2015/61. Qualitative risk overlay for supervisory judgement.

BUIDL.justification: Ethereum/multi-chain not designated as SFD system; not operating under DLT Pilot Regime.

bIB01.justification: Same. Swiss art. 973d CO grants Swiss legal certainty but no SFD coverage.

criteria.name: Custody chain layers between token and underlying Treasury

BUIDL.justification: BNY Mellon → BVI fund Ltd → token holder.

OUSG.justification: MMF custodians → Coinbase → Ondo I LP → token holder.

bIB01.justification: State Street Ireland → Maerki/InCore → JE Limited → token holder.

BUIDL.justification: NAV by Securitize; on-chain via RedStone.

OUSG.justification: End-of-day NAV via Ondo Price Oracle.

bIB01.justification: Chainlink + SIX Swiss Exchange + LSE references.

BUIDL.justification: Proxy upgradeable; admin multisig held by Securitize.

bIB01.justification: Updating function explicit per Terms §II. Tokenizer Backed Finance AG controls.

BUIDL.justification: Compliance freeze function present.

bIB01.justification: Pausing active; freezing function reserved for upgrade per §II.

criteria.name: Issuer Call Option / forced redemption clauses

BUIDL.justification: Per PPM; not unilateral termination clause publicly documented.

bIB01.justification: Article VI.iii: Issuer Call Option exercisable with 30 BD notice 'without providing for a specific reason'; in stress, Redemption Amount 'may be considerably lower'.

criteria.name: Substitution of issuer without investor consent

BUIDL.justification: Not documented publicly as unilateral.

bIB01.justification: Article XXIV: Issuer entitled at any time and without consent of Investors to be substituted as debtor by a new issuer.

BUIDL.justification: Fund-level liability limitation per BVI law and PPM.

bIB01.justification: Article XVII: liability exclusion for fraud, theft, cyber-attacks, drastic regulatory changes; Redemption Amount 'may be as low as USD 0.01' upon Extraordinary Event.

criteria.name: Realization Event creditor cascade before investors

BUIDL.justification: BVI fund assets bankruptcy-remote; investors are residual claimants on fund assets directly.

OUSG.justification: Same logic for Delaware LP fund structure.

bIB01.justification: Per Article XXII.ii: Security Agent fees → Paying Account Providers → Custodian + Broker (pari passu) → THEN investors pro-rata. Plus other realization costs.

BUIDL.justification: Implicit non-eligibility given BVI domicile and absence of EU notification.

bIB01.justification: Section 6 verbatim: 'ECB eligibility: The Product is not expected to be ECB eligible.'

main_blockers: Debt instrument legal form (CRR art. 122 unrated)
Extraordinary Event clause: Redemption to $0.01 possible

L0.label: Status quo (current state May 2026)
L0.verdict: No product eligible for any HQLA level

L1.label: UCITS-compatible MMF wrapper
L1.required_change: Restructure issuance as UCITS MMF under Regulation (EU) 2017/1131; domicile in EU jurisdiction (LU/IE/FR)

feasibility_by_product.BUIDL: Plausible — Luxembourg UCITS MMF version. Precedent: Franklin BENJI under US 1940 Act
feasibility_by_product.OUSG: Harder — fund-of-funds structure to flatten to direct holdings before UCITS wrapping
feasibility_by_product.bIB01: Requires radical reformulation from debt to fund unit; effectively a new product

L1.resulting_HQLA_level_potential: Level 1 or 2A via art. 15 UCITS look-through

L2.label: DLT Pilot Regime compliance
L2.required_change: Issuance via authorised DLT-SS or DLT-TSS under Regulation (EU) 2022/858
L2.current_state: 3 entities authorised in EU as of 2026-Q1; none of BUIDL/OUSG/bIB01 operate under DLT-PR
L2.resulting_HQLA_potential: Settlement finality resolved; ECB collateral eligibility discussion opens

L3.label: Native sovereign DLT issuance
L3.required_change: Tokens issued directly by sovereign treasury via authorised DLT-SS
precedents_in_trial: ECB Eurosystem trials on wholesale CBDC 2024-2026
Banque de France TARGET Instant Payment Settlement on DLT
L3.resulting_HQLA_potential: Direct Level 1 sovereign claim; full ECB collateral eligibility; bankruptcy remoteness equivalent to book-entry sovereign debt

limitations: Based on public documentation only; PPMs for BUIDL and Ondo I LP are not public
bIB01 Securities Note dated 8 May 2025 expires 7 May 2026 — Successor Base Prospectus status to verify
Scoring is qualitative judgement; final supervisory verdict may differ
Product structures evolve (BlackRock new offerings filed 9 May 2026); requires framework re-application
Stress event track record insufficient (longest = BUIDL since March 2024)
